import { spec, specId } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

export const anchoredParentSpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.anchored-parent"),
  title: "Parent spec with a full anchored ladder",
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "feature",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: "Earn implemented and has-verifier from resolving bindings." },
});
